text: flame stablization iii) Minimum fuel oil firing capacity a) For LDO : 7.5% BMCR heat input capacity b) For HFO/LSHS/HPS : 30% BMCR heat input capacity iv) Oil burners a) Type : Steam/air atomised with HEA ignitors Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 2 (Steam Generator and Auxiliaries) 2 - 18 b) Atomisation medium : Air for LDO and steam for HFO/LSHS/HPS c) Capacity : > To cater for 30% BMCR heat input with HFO/ LSHS/ HPS for load carrying and as oil support. > To cater for 7.5% BMCR heat input with LDO for startup at cold start conditions. d) Turndown ratio : 4:1 e) Control : Centralised automatic control with flame scanner and safety protection. 2.1.25 Draft Plant The forced draft (FD) fans and induced draf t (ID) fans shall be capable of maintaining balance draft conditions in the furnace over the entire load range with any one or both FD fans and any one or both ID fans in operation while burning the specified range of fuels. Description FD fans ID fans i) Type of fans Constant speed axial Variable speed radial/ constant speed axial ii) Fan sizing criteria with Each fan to be sized for Each fan to be sized for all the following 60% BMCR flow (one 60% BMCR flow (one conditions occurring stream in operation) stream in operation) together calculated taking into calculated taking into account following factors account following occurring together. factors occurring together. a) Type of coal firing Design/best/worst coal Design/best/worst coal whichever gives maximum whichever gives maximum FD fan air requirement flue gas flow. b) Power supply frequency 47.5 Hz 47.5 Hz c) Excess air 20% over stoichiometric 20% over the stoichiometric air requirement air requirement d) Fan inlet air/ flue 50 0C with 65% RH Gas temperature gas temperature corresponding to ambient air temperature of 500C and 65% RH e) Air heater air-in 10% or actual Based on minimum 15% leakage guaranteed value leakage from primary air whichever is higher and 10% leakage from secondary air or actual guaranteed values whichever is higher Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 2 (Steam Generator and Auxiliaries) 2 - 19 f) Pressure drop Not applicable 25 mmwc or actual through ESP guaranteed value whichever is higher g) Air-in leakage Not applicable
